*Have you interviewed with the LOCAL Public Eatery within the last 6 months?
*Have you ever worked with JOEY Restaurant Group (JOEY Restaurants, LOCAL Public Eatery or SALTLIK) before?
*The position you are applying for may involve responsibilities that require a high level of trust and integrity. Please be aware that a criminal record will not automatically prevent you from being considered for the position, and LOCAL Public Eatery will meet its obligations, if any, under applicable human rights legislation.
